channel.title: Entertainment on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Entertainment on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally's Saturday Special — Week of March 24, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally's longer lifestyle and gossip column. All fictional. All fabulous.

item.title: The Rumor Mill — March 24, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally with the week's whispers, rumours, and neighbourhood chatter. All fictional. All entertaining.

item.title: 💅 Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill — Saturday, February 7, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally back with de freshest fictional gossip! Carnival costumes, stadium VIP passes, mining camp drama, and who wedding get postpone AGAIN!
